Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The board is covered with schedules[n]and contact information. But there[n]are no plans past tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The board is covered with schedules[n]and contact information.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This used to mark the dates the team[n]would go exploring. Lately, exploration[n]seems to take up the entire schedule...[n]{f 1 1}
